info.name: Tuko Kadi - Opinion Polls in Group Chats
info.description: Opinion polls are created and published from the web aspirant dashboard. The app uses this API collection to login, fetch the user's groups, fetch group chat messages, detect messages where type is poll, and submit poll responses. Polls are added to chats by the web flow creating a group_messages row with message_type = poll and aspirant_poll_id linked to aspirant_polls.id.

request.description: Logs in the app user and stores token as auth_token for protected requests.
Returns groups the app user belongs to. A web-published poll is only visible/respondable if the user is a member of the poll group.

item.name: 3. Get group chat messages and extract poll id

exec: const pollMessage = Array.isArray(messages) ? messages.find((message) => message.type === 'poll' && message.poll) : null;
pm.test('Response is a message array', function () {

request.description: Use this in the app chat screen. Normal messages return type: text. Poll chat messages return type: poll and include a nested poll object with id, question, selected_option_index, total_responses, and options. The app should render those messages as poll cards and use poll.id when responding.

response.name: Example poll message response
response.body:
[
  {
    "id": 101,
    "type": "poll",
    "username": "Aspirant",
    "message": "[POLL #12]\nWhat issue should our campaign prioritize first?\n1. Roads and transport\n2. Water access",
    "latitude": null,
    "longitude": null,
    "created_at": "2026-07-14T08:00:00.000000Z",
    "poll": {
      "id": 12,
      "question": "What issue should our campaign prioritize first?",
      "scope_type": "national",
      "scope_value": null,
      "status": "published",
      "total_responses": 3,
      "selected_option_index": null,
      "options": [
        {
          "index": 0,
          "label": "Roads and transport",
          "response_count": 2,
          "response_percent": 67
        },
        {
          "index": 1,
          "label": "Water access",
          "response_count": 1,
          "response_percent": 33
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

request.description: Records or updates the logged-in user's vote for the selected option. option_index is zero-based and must match one of the option indexes from the poll payload in group messages.

response.name: Example poll response

request.description: Included for comparison. This creates message_type: text. Poll chat messages are not created by this app endpoint; they are created when the aspirant publishes a poll from the web dashboard.
